task: H2 - bounded candidate round 2: ANCHOR-CONSTRAINED family/isolate models using the WP-G audited anchors
highest_claim_layer_allowed: L2/L3 (a value-bearing candidate is admitted only PROVISIONALLY and counts as L5+ ONLY if it clears the mechanical bar below AND yields held-out reading success; honest expectation AT_ANCHOR_CONSTRAINED_NULL)
relationship_to_H1: Same 5 models (SEM/ANA/TYR serious, FIN unrelated negative-control, CTRL agnostic random) and the SAME end-to-end null battery + Holm + LOO + random-lexicon calibration as H1. The NEW element in H2 is the ANCHOR CONSTRAINT: the 6 WP-G audited SEED_B toponym anchors (external place-name referents) are used to (a) augment each family's predicted-form set (anchor-augmented reading) and (b) be EXCLUDED from the held-out target as leakage. Per G3 SEED_A=0 and Art. XII, every anchor's pinned sign-value coincides with the GORILA/LB conventional value it was read through, so the anchor-augmented forms are CIRCULAR for grading and contribute ZERO to the honest (strict) held-out score. A permissive score that grants the anchors is reported as a sensitivity bound.

anchor_inventory.source: data/anchors_v2/seeds.json (WP-G audited); SEED_B value-bearing toponym anchors only
anchor_inventory.excluded_from_grading_because: Art. XII: every SEED_B toponym is READ through GORILA/LB conventional sign-values; the pinned value == the GORILA homomorphic value, so a held-out match credited to an anchor value is not independent evidence for any family. Additionally G3 shows all 6 are one-toponym-deep (SEED_B, empirical LOTO recovers only {I,RI}, each one-deep) => 0 held-out-survivable. Marked circular_for_grading=true and excluded from the strict verdict score.
anchor_inventory.seed_X_note: The 97 SEED_X records (57 shape-homomorphy + 11 Cypriot value-inheritance + 25 onomastic personal names + 4 internal-variation) and the 6 relative/structural G2 classes are circular/value-blind and are NOT used as value anchors at all.

held_out_target.unit: GORILA multi-sign syllabic word tokens (t=='word', >=2 signs, all signs in the AB syllabary), MINUS anchor-source tokens (leakage)
held_out_target.leakage_exclusion: any held-out token whose sign-tuple EQUALS an anchor form, or STARTS-WITH or ENDS-WITH an anchor form (inflected/compounded toponym), is removed from the graded target set and counted separately.
held_out_target.note: The anchor-excluded LA word set is the HELD-OUT scoring target. Family predictions derive from external candidate-language lexicons + a FIXED AB correspondence; anchor forms are external toponym strings. No LA statistic informs any family's phonemes, correspondence, or the anchors.

non_circularity: Known Linear B syllabic values define the A<->B correspondence, used to EXPAND candidate-language phonemes into predicted LA sign-value strings; never read off LA.

The 6 SEED_B toponym anchors are external place-name referents but their pinned sign-VALUES equal the GORILA conventional values => marked circular_for_grading and EXCLUDED from the strict verdict score (Art. XII). Only a permissive sensitivity score grants them.
The D5 anonymous relative classes and all SEED_X anchors are value-blind and never model inputs.
LB wordforms appear ONLY as the wrong-language null corpus (W).
anchor_constraint_is_family_independent: Toponyms are language-independent proper nouns read through the shared AB syllabary; every AB-based family augments with the SAME 6 anchor forms and inherits the SAME 17 pinned sign-values. So the anchor constraint - like the D5 relative classes (F4) - CANNOT break the symmetry between families. Recorded for the record; it does not gate scoring.

scoring_protocol.primary_statistic_strict: token-weighted match rate on the anchor-EXCLUDED held-out multi-sign syllabic LA word set, using FAMILY-LEXEME forms ONLY (anchor-augmented forms excluded as circular). This is the verdict score.
scoring_protocol.secondary_statistic_permissive: same held-out set but family-lexeme forms UNION the 6 anchor forms (grants anchors as if externally admissible); the difference isolates any anchor reading power beyond the anchor source words.
scoring_protocol.anchor_only_reading_power: count anchor-excluded held-out words fully coverable by the 17 anchor-pinned signs, and count those actually MATCHED by an anchor form; expected ~0 beyond source words (SEED_A=0).
scoring_protocol.correspondence_expansion: identical bounded expander for every family (geminate collapse; coda spelled C + epenthetic dead-vowel over all family vowels; EXPAND_CAP=256 forms/lexeme); effective_n reported.

end_to_end_null_battery.S_order_shuffle: shuffle signs within each anchor-excluded LA word (kills within-word form structure) - non-decisive
end_to_end_null_battery.W_wrong_language_LB: opaque DAMOS Linear B multi-sign wordforms, length-matched to the anchor-excluded LA set - decisive
end_to_end_null_battery.R_random_prior: permute the family lexicon (same #entries/kinds, same phoneme lengths, random phonemes from the family inventory) - decisive

scoring_protocol.decisive_FWER_family: max(p_W, p_R) on the STRICT score (must beat BOTH decisive nulls)
scoring_protocol.multiplicity: Holm step-down across the 5 families on the decisive FWER (Art. VIII)
scoring_protocol.leave_one_lexeme_out: worst-case decisive p after dropping each family lexeme (Egyptian-channel discipline) on the strict score
scoring_protocol.random_lexicon_calibration: N_CAL=300 same-structure random lexicons per serious family + the negative control; real strict rate percentile in the random-lexicon band + raw-bar false-clear rate

admission_verdict_rule.GENUINE (family counts): on the STRICT (anchor-excluded, family-lexeme-only) score: Holm-adjusted decisive FWER < 0.05 AND LOO worst decisive p < 0.05 AND real strict rate above the random-lexicon band (percentile p < 0.05, false-clear <= 0.10) AND the agnostic CONTROL does NOT clear the raw bar. A GENUINE family would still require held-out READING success + cross-site survival before any L5+ wording (Art. XV).
admission_verdict_rule.AT_ANCHOR_CONSTRAINED_NULL (expected): no family is GENUINE on the strict score AND anchor augmentation adds no held-out reading power beyond the anchor source words (permissive == strict on non-source held-out).

families_source: identical to preregistrations/H_round1_prereg.json (5 families); loaded, not re-specified, to guarantee byte-identical model definitions.
